title: T-101 — Dept Taxonomy Editor (SET-061) — split/merge/add wizard (ADR-030)
prompt:
# T-101 — Dept Taxonomy Editor (SET-061) — split/merge/add wizard (ADR-030)

## Goal
SET-061 Dept Taxonomy Editor production component (spec-driven; no exact prototype).

Spec-driven UI: no exact canonical prototype exists under `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx` for this screen. `02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-061 / dept-taxonomy` replaces prototype parity as the authoritative UI contract. Reuse wizard/form primitives where available; do not implement PromoteToL2Modal as dept taxonomy editor. Any prototype snippets are element/pattern references only, not 1:1 screen sources. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/tenant/depts/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/tenant/depts/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production page renders, it MUST satisfy `02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-061 / dept-taxonomy` as the source of truth. UX spec replaces prototype parity for this task; no wrong/adjacent prototype may be used as a 1:1 source. Reused prototype elements must be limited to matching primitives/patterns and must not change the screen semantics, routes, fields, or states required by the UX spec.
- Given action='split' source='technical' targets=['food-safety','quality-lab'] without column_mapping, when submitted, then UI raises COLUMN_MAPPING_REQUIRED (V-SET-30).
- Given action='add' new code='regulatory-affairs', when submitted, then tenant_variations.dept_overrides JSONB receives the new entry.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/tenant/depts/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not claim 1:1 prototype parity for this screen; exact prototype is missing and UX spec is authoritative.
